# Himalayan Serenity Travel
# Sacred Himalayan Expeditions from Pithoragarh

> Himalayan Serenity Travel offers curated expeditions to Adi Kailash, Om Parvat,
> Panchachuli and Darma Valley in the Kumaon Himalaya, Uttarakhand.
> Headquartered in Pithoragarh and Dharchula, we specialize in sacred pilgrimage
> journeys, high-altitude trekking and Himalayan wellness retreats from Delhi.

## Pages

- Home: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/
- About: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/about
- Contact: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/contact
- FAQ: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/faq
- Blog: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/blog
- Sustainability: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/sustainability

- Adi Kailash & Om Parvat Expedition: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/packages/adi-kailash-expedition

- Eastern Kumaon Cinematic Expedition: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/packages/cinematic-expedition
- Eastern Kumaon Wilderness Expedition: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/packages/wilderness-expedition
- Himalayan Wellness & Meditation Retreat: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/packages/wellness-retreat
- Women-Only Expedition Darma Valley: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/packages/darma-valley-womens-retreat
- Himalayan Photography Expedition: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/packages/photography-expedition
- Winter Himalayan Wellness Retreat: https://www.himalayanserenitytravel.com/packages/winter-himalayan-wellness-retreat
